channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Golf venues
channel.description: Latest golf venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: Siam Country Club Pattaya
item.description: Multiple championship courses: Old Course (1970, Top 100 world), Plantation, Waterside. Asia's premier golf destination.

item.title: Burapha Golf Club
item.description: 36 holes designed for natural beauty (lakes, hills, palms). Hosted 2010 Thailand Open. Top tournament venue.

item.title: Bangpra International Golf Club
item.description: Opened 1958 — one of the first golf courses in the Pattaya region. 18 holes, par 72, 1988 renovation.

item.title: Mountain Shadow Country Club
item.description: Ron Fream-designed 18-hole par-72 golf course halfway between Bangkok and Pattaya, built on a former mango plantation with four rare island greens and 6,722-yard layout.

item.title: Laem Chabang International Country Club
item.description: Jack Nicklaus design (1995). 27 holes. Widely considered the best golf course layout in Pattaya.

item.title: Phoenix Gold Golf & Country Club
item.description: Multiple loops with beginner-friendly options. Established Pattaya golf destination.

item.title: Treasure Hill Golf & Country Club
item.description: Par-72 course, established 1994. Popular for low green fees and enjoyable rounds.

item.title: Chee Chan Golf Resort
item.description: Premium destination golf resort in Na Jomtien / Sattahip with Buddha Mountain views, championship layout, and modern clubhouse facilities. ฿฿฿ green fees.

item.title: Chatrium Golf Resort Soi Dao Chanthaburi
item.description: 27-hole course, driving range, pro shop, three-floor clubhouse with hotel, pool, locker rooms, spa, restaurants.

item.title: Pattana Golf Club & Resort (Pattana Sports Resort)
item.description: 27-hole Pattana Golf Club & Resort in Si Racha — championship layout (40 km north of Pattaya, 90 min from Bangkok) plus on-site sports resort with multiple recreation amenities.

item.title: St. Andrews 2000 Pattaya
item.description: St. Andrews 2000 — championship 18-hole golf course in Ban Chang, Rayong (45 min from Pattaya) with mature parkland setting and full clubhouse facilities.

item.title: Khao Kheow Country Club
item.description: Pete Dye-designed 27-hole championship course in Bang Phra / Si Racha — host of Asian Tour Thailand Open and one of Pattaya's most strategic, water-defined layouts.

item.title: Pattaya Country Club
item.description: 18-hole Pattaya Country Club at Khao Mai Kaeo — one of the closest golf courses to Pattaya proper with championship layout, mature parkland setting, and value-tier green fees.

item.title: Pattaya Golf Driving Range
item.description: Standalone Pattaya driving range with multi-tier hitting bays, putting green, short-game practice area, and equipment rental — ideal for warm-ups before championship rounds.

item.title: Golf Hub Pattaya (Indoor Simulator + Club Fitting)
item.description: Only premium indoor simulator + club fitting in Pattaya. TrackMan / GC Quad launch monitor. AC year-round practice. Multiple locations.

item.title: Diana Driving Range Pattaya
item.description: 30-bay floodlit dedicated driving range. 200-yard depth. On-site restaurant. Soi Diana area central. Professional teaching pros.

item.title: Greenwood Golf Club & Resort (formerly Noble Place)
item.description: 27-hole Peter Thomson + Dennis Wolveridge design. Tree-lined Chonburi hills. Australian Open Champion architect. Value pricing for premium architecture.
